items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 4 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「上手简单,安全可靠,TeleAgent星辰超级智能体不搞极客玩具那一套」、「Google Deepmind argues video generators already contain the world models computer vision has been missing」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。

items.title: Google Deepmind argues video generators already contain the world models computer vision has been missing
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「AI 技术演进和可复用工程实践」。原文摘要显示：Google Deepmind's GenCeption repurposes a video generator for classic vision tasks such as depth estimation and segmentation, matching state-of-the-art systems with far less training data. The model trained almost entir…
items.insightText: 先快速判断它是否包含可复用方法、架构或工程经验，再决定是否进入日报深读。

items.title: AI Mania Is Eviscerating Global Decision-Making

items.insightText: 先快速判断它是否包含可复用方法、架构或工程经验，再决定是否进入日报深读。

items.title: Moonshot's Kimi K3 outperforms Fable 5 in frontend code but lags far behind in complex math
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「物流轨迹、地址理解、召回排序或地理智能」。原文摘要显示：Moonshot's Kimi K3 is the first Chinese model to top the Code Arena: Frontend rankings, beating Claude Fable 5 and GPT-5.6 Sol by a wide margin. But on advanced math, the gap is stark: Kimi K3 scores only about 39 perce…
items.insightText: 重点看数据采集、链路诊断、排序指标和线上一致性校验，判断是否可迁移到地址 Agent 自进化架构。
